evidence_summary: Closeout for POL-370: updated src/loop/POLARIS.md with editing rules for ledger event emission and enhanced telemetry fields; updated src/loop/SUMMARY.md with key behavior descriptions. No docs archived, no links broken, no cognition notes to archive.
